architecture.note: Inward-only deps (contract types + injected readers); no IO; no singletons; WPB-01/07 satisfied; summarise_memory separable for WP-004 reuse.

security.note: No secrets, no network, no eval/exec, no path handling (contract owns id validation); injected text is data not a sink; vendor-neutral key guard tested.

quality.note: CR-10 #4 O(N^2)-over-same-collection in summarise_memory trim loops; fixed inline to O(N) running-total suffix; equivalence property-checked over 2000 random trials; behaviour preserved.

findings_in_neighbours.note: No production neighbours; module consumed later by WP-004/005/007 via the contract.
